query: Tromsø Skimaraton cross country ski race Tromsø area

videos.title: Sprint race Men - Tromsø #SkimoWC23
videos.description:
The main protagonists of the Sprint races of the past seasons, Arno Lietha and Oriol Cardona Coll, proved that they are just the best in this discipline. The two great rivals made it to the finals, and Lietha won ahead of the Spanish Sprint specialist by half of a ski.

Lietha had an exceptional season. He won five out of six Sprints and defended the small Globe for this discipline.

▶ WEBSITE: http://www.ismf-ski.org
▶ FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/ismf.ski
▶ TWITTER: https://twitter.com/ISMFSkimo
▶ INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/ismf_world_cup

Anfängerkurs mit Hurtigruten, Ausflug auf dem "Hausberg" von Tromsö. Hurtigruten Ausflug im Winter. Nachmittags geht es mit Skilehrerin auf die Loipe, als Anfänger-Kurs.

videos.title: Tromsø Ski marathon with Martin Korsner | SkatePro.com
videos.description:
Martin attended this year's ski marathon in Tromsø, and he made a little vlog about his experience. He shared some tips and tell you a bit about his preparation and evaluation of the race. 

Remember to like and subscribe. 
Got any questions? Please comment and we will reply within a few days.

videos.title: Start 120 km Lillehammer Troll Ski Marathon 2019
2012-02-11 Tromsø Skimaraton 2012 - Oddgeir Sølvfæstersen
videos.description: Oddgeir Sølvfæstersen, Northern Runners, leverer en imponerende skimaraton på sørpeføre. Tiden ble 2:36:15, kun 35:07 bak vinneren Snorri Einarsson.

videos.title: Kayaking in Tromsø
videos.description:
Experience the sea in an intense and exciting way. Together with your experienced guide, you paddle in the waters off the coast of Tromsø with the mountains forming a stunning backdrop. A great way to silently travel through these pristine waters and to get close to the marine wildlife. We use stable, double, sea kayaks and no paddling experience is needed to join this excursion. The guide will give you instructions and support you along the way.

Our Original Norwegian Coastal Express voyage is your pure and unfiltered escape to the charming everyday life of the Norwegian coast. Come join us on an iconic journey: 

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Hurtigruten/  
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hurtigruten/
Website: https://global.hurtigruten.com/destinations/norway/
